metadata.name: Inquire About Life Insurance Policy Exclusions

description: A policyholder wants to understand what is not covered by their life insurance policy.

nodes.task_description: Identify the policyholder and retrieve their policy document.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the customer's policy contract.

nodes.task_description: Review the exclusions section of the policy contract.

expected_outcome.value: Agent reviews the contract and finds the standard suicide clause (typically for the first two years).

nodes.task_description: Clearly explain the specific exclusions listed in the policy to the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent explains the suicide clause and any other relevant exclusions in simple terms.
